content.text:
Build lỗi sau merge. Cần fix 2 vấn đề:
1. `typingTimer` không tồn tại trên `ActivityTracker`
2. `extractContentText` không được định nghĩa trong `adapter.ts`

content.content: 949:        ? extractContentText(meta.rawOutput)

940	    sessionId: string,
941	    content: OutgoingMessage,
942	    verbosity: DisplayVerbosity,
943	  ): Promise<void> {
944	    const threadId = this.getThreadId(sessionId);
945	    const meta = (content.metadata ?? {}) as Partial<ToolUpdateMeta>;
946	    const tracker = this.getOrCreateTracker(sessionId, threadId, verbosity);
947	    const output =
948	      meta.rawOutput !== undefined
949	        ? extractContentText(meta.rawOutput)
950	        : undefined;
951	    await tracker.onToolUpdate(
952	      meta.id ?? "",
953	      meta.status ?? "completed",
954	      meta.viewerLinks as { file?: string; diff?: string } | undefined,
955	      meta.viewerFilePath as string | undefined,
956	      output,
957	      meta.name as string | undefined,
958	      meta.rawInput,
959	      meta.displaySummary as string | undefined,

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

content.content: 949:        ? extractContentText(meta.rawOutput)
